researchBoundary: Public Canara and public regulator/security sources only; this prototype does not claim access to internal Canara systems.

systems.name: Digital Security and Fraud Monitoring
systems.publicCapability: Public material describes AI/ML transaction monitoring and fraud monitoring support.
systems.prototypeInnovation: Evidence-linked real-time anomaly desk that correlates document tamper signals, source intelligence, transaction-flow simulation, and Qwen explanations.
systems.deliverableFit: Real-time anomaly detection and intelligent underwriting review support.

systems.name: Digital Lending Journey
systems.publicSource: Canara Bank Digital Lending Solution RFP
systems.publicCapability: Public RFP material emphasizes end-to-end digital lending journeys across retail, MSME, agri, and gold loans.
systems.prototypeInnovation: Underwriting cockpit with dossier intake, media previews, source provenance, 3D fund-flow investigation, and decision-pack export.
systems.deliverableFit: Faster and more reliable decision-making during underwriting.

systems.name: MSME Data-Driven Credit Assessment
systems.publicCapability: Public page describes paperless data-driven creditworthiness assessment for small-value MSME lending.
systems.prototypeInnovation: Financial consistency engine and live demo transaction graph identify turnover, GST, ledger rhythm, and suspicious routing inconsistencies.
systems.deliverableFit: Financial-statement anomaly detection with traceable evidence.

systems.name: Loan Due Diligence
systems.publicSource: Canara Loan Policy / Fair Lending Practices
systems.publicCapability: Public loan material emphasizes verification of borrower, guarantor, documents, project details, and credit information.
systems.prototypeInnovation: Control checklist binds land records, legal opinions, financial statements, media, public-source corroboration, and reviewer challenge questions.
systems.deliverableFit: Tampering and forgery detection across land, legal, and financial evidence.

systems.name: Cyber Awareness and Compliance
systems.publicCapability: Public material supports security awareness and cyber risk governance themes.
systems.prototypeInnovation: Connector health, local-only Qwen guardrails, provenance status, and degraded-source visibility make the intelligence layer auditable.

controlTemplates.label: Land record integrity
controlTemplates.reviewQuestion: Do collateral records, survey identifiers, timestamps, and location claims agree with source evidence?

controlTemplates.label: Legal document authenticity
controlTemplates.reviewQuestion: Do seals, signatures, advocate references, and legal opinions show tamper or template inconsistency?

controlTemplates.label: Financial statement consistency
controlTemplates.reviewQuestion: Do statement inflows, GST turnover, account rhythm, and routed fund paths agree with declared business activity?

controlTemplates.label: Public-source corroboration
controlTemplates.reviewQuestion: Are live public-source, advisory, domain, and media signals fresh, cited, and consistent with case facts?

controlTemplates.label: Local Qwen decision support
controlTemplates.reviewQuestion: Did the local Qwen 3.5 4B core cite evidence, stay within local runtime guardrails, and avoid unsupported conclusions?
